inherited_bottom_sections.interpretation_limit: Nominal STEP face sections, not global minimum-thickness or PCB seating proof.

risks.finding: Current FPC bend keepout intersects both the selected FH34 envelope and USB1 envelope; exact folded route and latch access are not proven.
risks.evidence: J-to-USB courtyard gap=0.965567 mm; front pass-through=[61.68, 9.14, 71.32, 13.36]; overlaps={'fpc_bend_keepout_vs_fh34_mm3': 13.693049999999994, 'fpc_bend_keepout_vs_usb1_mm3': 78.99801436799996, 'fpc_bend_keepout_vs_front_outside_candidate_slot_mm3': 130.92349751357452}
risks.release_gate: Use the photo-confirmed rear contact face in a 1:1 fold mock-up, then confirm Pin 1 and pass repeated insertion and closed-shell powered test without touching USB1.

risks.finding: The PCB connector rotation is fixed in the candidate, but the 180-degree fold can reverse the apparent left/right pin order; physical mapping is not closed.
risks.evidence: User front/back photos confirm 6-o'clock exit and contacts on the display rear; no unambiguous physical Pin 1 mark is visible. J_DISP1 KiCad centre=(154.625,128.500), rotation=0.
risks.release_gate: Photograph front/back, continuity-check all ten pins and compare a printed 1:1 pin-number overlay before ordering.

risks.finding: The imported PCB does not provide a trustworthy board-to-front-cover Z datum or complete verified component heights.
risks.evidence: 31 front courtyards project into the screen panel; coverage 66/74.
risks.release_gate: Measure PCB seating Z and critical component heights, model all screen-overlap parts, then pass a closed-shell section/collision audit.

risks.finding: USB1 XY is authoritative but its body height is still a conservative proxy, so FPC-to-USB clearance is not verified.
risks.release_gate: Identify exact USB MPN or caliper-measure the mounted connector including solder protrusion and repeat the bend audit.

risks.finding: The 0.40 mm gasket is only geometry; compression, adhesive creep and glass stress are untested.
risks.release_gate: Select actual gasket/adhesive, print a sacrificial front, and inspect powered pixels after repeated close/open cycles.

risks.finding: The loose 1.00 mm rear frame has no fastening or preload feature and is not a production retainer.
risks.evidence: current fit-check exports a separated frame at the cover interior datum
risks.release_gate: Choose screws/snaps/adhesive and verify retention, glass load and service sequence in a real print.

risks.finding: Inherited cover Ø3.0 mm bores and PCB Ø2.0 mm holes do not select a screw or printed pilot-hole compensation.
risks.evidence: four inherited boss face pairs found; current PCB mounting centres unchanged
risks.release_gate: Print a hole/boss coupon, select screw or inserts, and inspect after three assembly cycles.

risks.finding: Nominal inherited floor/boss sections do not prove local minimum wall or print anisotropy.
risks.evidence: bottom STEP nominal floor 1.60 mm, boss radial wall 2.00 mm
risks.release_gate: Run slicer thin-wall inspection and a material-specific dimensional coupon.

risks.finding: Shrinkage, supports, warping and surface finish remain printer/material/orientation dependent.
risks.release_gate: Print one sacrificial fit shell and record XY hole and Z-stack deviations before release.

limits: No real assembly evidence is created by this audit.
The visual PCB Z datum and USB height are explicit proxies.
FPC exit and contact face are photo-confirmed; folded Pin 1 mapping and latch operation remain physical gates.
